heading: Art. 93. Cruelty and maltreatment
label: 893 Art. 93. Cruelty and maltreatment
text: Any person subject to this chapter who is guilty of cruelty toward, or oppression or maltreatment of, any person subject to his orders shall be punished as a court-martial may direct.
